babyDevelopment: Fingers and toes begin to form (webbed). The tail vanishes. Taste buds are forming, and nerve cells are connecting.
bodyChanges: Your uterus has grown from the size of a lemon to a grapefruit. You may feel mild cramping as it expands.
tips: Prepare a list of questions for your OB/GYN

do: Discuss genetic testing with your doctor
dont: Dye your hair just yet (wait until 2nd trimester)

travelAdvisory.note: Safe. Consider scheduling your first prenatal visit before flying.

milestoneDescription: Most moms get their first dating ultrasound around this time!
